witness: claude-glm-gcp preset resolves to fak fronting a GLM-5.2 /v1 with model glm-5.2
what_this_proves: The glm-gcp preset (claude-glm-gcp) wires the real Claude Code harness through fak's openai backend to a GLM-5.2 OpenAI-compatible /v1. Proven on BOTH launchers against a mock /v1 advertising model glm-5.2 (no GPU / no live GLM weights). The live model turn is hardware-gated; the preset + wire are proven here.
upstream_under_test: mock OpenAI /v1 advertising {"id":"glm-5.2"} (stands in for the GCP serving node)

bash_launcher.serve_argv: fak serve --addr 127.0.0.1:8138 --provider openai --engine inkernel --model glm-5.2 --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8200/v1 --policy examples/dogfood-claude-policy.json

bringup_plan.renders: gcloud compute instances create ... --accelerator=type=nvidia-h200-141gb,count=8 + the preflight-gated glm52_sglang_vllm_serve.sh + the claude-glm-gcp hand-off

hardware_gated_remaining: Run scripts/gcp-glm-serve.sh --apply on an authenticated host with H200/B200 quota, tunnel to its /v1, then: claude-glm-gcp --probe "say pong".
